heading: Partnerships with historically Black colleges and universities, Hispanic-serving institutions, and tribal colleges
label: 7381c–1 Partnerships with historically Black colleges and universities, Hispanic-serving institutions, and tribal colleges
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 3168 and is classified to .section 3167 of Pub. L. 101–510section 7381d of this title
Amendments2008—Subsec. (a)(5). made technical amendment to reference in original act which appears in text as reference to .Pub. L. 110–315section 1801(a) of title 25
amendments: Amendments2008—Subsec. (a)(5). made technical amendment to reference in original act which appears in text as reference to .Pub. L. 110–315section 1801(a) of title 25

children.heading: Hispanic-serving institution
children.label: 1 Hispanic-serving institution
children.text: The term “Hispanic-serving institution” has the meaning given the term in .section 1101a(a) of title 20

children.heading: Historically Black college or university
children.label: 2 Historically Black college or university
children.text: The term “historically Black college or university” has the meaning given the term “part B institution” in .section 1061 of title 20

children.heading: National Laboratory
children.label: 3 National Laboratory
children.text: The term “National Laboratory” has the meaning given the term in .section 15801 of this title

children.heading: Science facility
children.label: 4 Science facility
children.text: The term “science facility” has the meaning given the term “single-purpose research facility” in .section 16182 of this title

children.heading: Tribal college
children.label: 5 Tribal college
children.text: The term “tribal college” has the meaning given the term “tribally controlled college or university” in .section 1801(a) of title 25

children.heading: Education partnership
children.label: b Education partnership
children.text: The Secretary shall require the director of each National Laboratory, and may require the head of any science facility, to increase the participation of historically Black colleges or universities, Hispanic-serving institutions, or tribal colleges in any activity that increases the capacity of the historically Black colleges or universities, Hispanic-serving institutions, or tribal colleges to train personnel in science or engineering.
training activities carried out at a National Laboratory or science facility; and
mentoring activities carried out at a National Laboratory or science facility.

children.heading: Report
children.label: d Report
children.text: Not later than 2 years after , the Secretary shall submit to Congress a report describing the activities carried out under this section.August 8, 2005
